functions.label: call_m4aSoundMain
functions.notes: Simple sound wrapper from asm/asm00_0.s. Implemented in src/asm00_0_soundmain.c and wired into the ROM via the agbcc-generated wrapper include; a small post-process step normalizes the wrapper epilogue so the linked bytes and final ROM SHA1 remain identical.

functions.label: call_m4a_2_814F00C
functions.notes: Simple sound wrapper from asm/asm00_0.s. First C translation lives in src/asm00_0_sound.c and compiles through the new agbcc-based auxiliary C pipeline, but it is not linked into the ROM yet, so the original ASM implementation remains authoritative until a byte-matching replacement path is ready.

functions.label: InitBattle
functions.notes: Initial battle setup (placeholder entry until real disassembly is imported).
